launchTransitionRequires: A real received-message receipt proving football@playfranchisearchitect.com forwards or copies to Studio operations.

driftPolicy: Local contradictions block. Authoritative registry drift warns locally and must be corrected through signed Studio Ark cargo; this repo never edits the sibling tree.
